stemHtml: The pilot uses the EFB to calculate the FLEX TEMP, which gives an assumed temperature of 56°. However, the pilot chooses to use 52° instead. How will the new flex temperature affect the Take-off Distance Required (TODR) and the Climb Gradient?

options.a: Take off distance required decreases, and climb gradient increases.
options.b: Take off distance required increases, and climb gradient increases.
options.c: Take off distance required increases, and climb gradient decreases.
options.d: Take off distance required decreases, and climb gradient decreases.
